<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "Near-real-time forecast validation"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
---

# Near-real-time forecast validation

Near-real-time validation compares recent operational forecasts with recent Class IV observations.
They are intended for scientific validation and daily monitoring, not for annual benchmark ranking.

::: {.live-evaluations-table-wrap}

| System | Source init | Eval init | Obs cutoff | Report |
|--------|-------------|-----------|------------|--------|
| GLONET | 2026-06-01 | 2026-05-13 | 2026-05-23 | [Report](reports/glonet.latest.global.report.html) |

:::

The observation source is `project-oceanbench/public/observations2026/`.
The cutoff avoids the recent current-observation gap in the development observation bucket.
For local development, the report opens the real OCTO GLONET forecast from 2026-06-01 and temporarily assigns it to the older 2026-05-13 evaluation init.
This date remapping is only a wiring test until OCTO retains forecast outputs long enough to evaluate true past inits.
